idea-plugin.name: SQLTest
idea-plugin.description:
Language support for sqllogictest (.test) files, the text-driven testing framework used by DuckDB and other SQL databases.
  • Syntax highlighting for SQL keywords, directives, comments, strings, and numbers
  • Proper result section handling (no highlighting bleed from query results)
  • Code folding for statement/query blocks, loops, and result sections
  • Structure view — navigate between tests, loops, requires in the sidebar
  • Gutter icons — green check (statement ok), red X (statement error), play (query)
  • Brace matching for loop/endloop and foreach/endforeach
  • Error annotations — mismatched loops, missing results, bad qualifiers, column count mismatch
  • SQL formatter — uppercase keywords, break into multi-line clauses (quick-fix)
  • Quick fixes — fix column types, format SQL, remove duplicate requires
  • Go to Next/Previous Test (Ctrl+Shift+Down/Up)
  • Test counter in status bar
  • Supports .test, .test_slow, .testslow, .benchmark, and .slt files
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.3.0
  • 23 new directive keywords: reconnect, sleep, hash-threshold, unzip, test-env, tags, continue, template, cache, cache_file, cleanup, init, reload, resultmode, result_query, assert, run, include, argument, subgroup, storage, retry, require_reinit
  • SQL formatter with quick-fix: uppercases keywords, breaks into multi-line clauses, indents subqueries, column defs, CTEs
  • Error: query column count mismatch (with quick-fix to adjust type string)
  • Error: invalid query return type characters (with quick-fix)
  • Error: empty query type specification, missing loop/foreach parameters
  • Warning: duplicate require (with quick-fix to remove), invalid mode, invalid sleep unit, empty SQL body, statement ok with result section, empty loop range, non-numeric hash-threshold
  • Statement qualifiers: debug and debug_skip now recognized
  • Full .benchmark file support: template, cache, run, init, cleanup, reload, resultmode, assert, argument, subgroup, storage, retry, require_reinit, result_query, cache_file, include
  • 275 tests (up from 198)
1.2.0
  • Structure view: navigate statements, queries, loops, requires from sidebar
  • Code folding for statement/query blocks, loops, and foreach blocks
  • Gutter icons: green check (ok), red X (error), play button (query)
  • Brace matching for loop/endloop and foreach/endforeach pairs
  • Error annotations: mismatched loop/endloop, missing ----, bad statement qualifiers
  • Go to Next/Previous Test actions (Ctrl+Shift+Down/Up)
  • Status bar widget: shows test count for open file
  • Context-aware highlighting: directives, SQL keywords, dimmed result output
  • 25 unit tests for lexer token streams
  • New directives: require, require-env, mode, halt, skipif, onlyif, foreach, etc.
1.1.2
  • Fix: apostrophe in query results no longer breaks syntax highlighting (#10)
  • Added RESULT_SECTION lexer state for proper result section handling
  • Expanded SQL keyword list with modern DuckDB keywords
  • GitHub Actions CI

action.description: Navigate to the next statement/query block
Navigate to the previous statement/query block
